title: What's New in WorshipFlow
message: Here's what's been added and improved across the app this month:
bulletPoints: Verse of the Day — a daily NLT Bible verse with inspiring insights and cross-references now appears at the top of every dashboard. React with emojis and share team reflections.
Church Events dashboard — renamed and redesigned to show all scheduled events (not just services) with correct upcoming counts and member avatars.
Bento grid dashboard — all team members now see a beautiful card-based dashboard layout tailored to their role and permissions.
Admin badge — redesigned with a seamless glow and proper alignment next to your name in the greeting.
Quick actions redesigned — icon grid stretches edge-to-edge for faster one-tap access to key features.
Calendar event panel — tapping a calendar date on mobile now opens a centered modal instead of a sheet, keeping events visible at a glance.
Profile photo improvements — member avatars in the Church Events tile now resolve photos using multiple fallback strategies for higher accuracy.
Sidebar now closes automatically when navigating to Scheduling on mobile.
